prestazioni: Upgrade the N63B44O2 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) with a bespoke Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system featuring 80mm carbon-fiber tips and a bypass valve for enhanced scavenging, paired with a Dimsport Genius 2.0 ECU remap targeting 700+ HP (stock: 600 HP) with a 22 psi boost limit on the stock BorgWarner turbos (replaced with hybrid units: Garrett GTX4274R cores with billet compressor wheels and Inconel turbine housings).

Install an Alpina-specific CSF Racing dual-core aluminum radiator with integrated oil cooler and a PWR Performance intercooler upgrade (50% larger than OEM) to maintain intake temps below 45°C under sustained 3rd-gear pulls, complemented by a Radium Engineering fuel system upgrade (dual 450 LPH pumps, -8AN lines, and a 1,200cc/min port-injection kit for E85 compatibility).

Replace the ZF 8HP76 8-speed transmission with a rebuilt unit featuring a Level 10 Motorsports torque converter (3,800 RPM stall), Sonnax billet valve body, and a PRL Motorsports short-throw shifter with carbon-fiber shift knob, paired with a Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential (40% lockup) and 3.91 final drive ratio for optimized 0-60 mph acceleration (target: 3.2s).
estetica: Apply a full GTSport carbon-fiber aero kit (front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with a 3M Satin Space Gray vinyl wrap (matte finish) and Alpina Classic 20-inch multi-spoke wheels (Style V in Silver II, 9.5J front/10.5J rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 295/25 R20 rear).

Install a custom Alpina B5 Touring-specific Rocket Bunny widebody conversion (fender flares with 50mm extended wheel arches) and a Vorsteiner V-RT rear spoiler (carbon-fiber, adjustable angle) for downforce balance, paired with OEM Alpina badging in gold leaf and a custom LED taillight tint (Lux H8 V4 bulbs with smoked lenses).

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara headliner (black with Alpina blue stitching), Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon-fiber shells, Alpina blue leather inserts), and a MOTEC C187 dash display (replacing the iDrive screen) with a custom Alpina-themed digital gauge cluster (boost, AFR, and oil temp readouts).
